channel.title: Hormone Molecular Biology and Clinical Investigation
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Hormone Molecular Biology and Clinical Investigation

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Randomized, double-blind clinical trial evaluating the impact of freeze-dried garlic extract capsules on blood pressure, lipid profile, and nitric oxide levels in individuals at risk for hypertension
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0019

item.title: Evaluation of diagnostic potential of maternal serum ischemia modified albumin in cases of pre-eclampsia
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0010

item.title: Hypothalamus-pituitary-adrenal axis in patients with post-traumatic stress disorders and related to oxidative stress
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0017

item.title: Evaluation of the effect of taurine on the matrix metalloproteinase-9 and the expression changes of miRNA-21 and miRNA-146a in SH-SY5Y cell line
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0005

item.title: Unveiling bisphenol A toxicity: human health impacts and sustainable treatment strategies
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0034

item.title: Optimizing ICSI outcomes in women with PCOS: the influence of BMI, hormonal levels, and male fertility parameters
item.description: Article by Muhjah Falah Hassan, Hind Abdul Kadim, Rabab Zahir Al-Yasiry, Sahbaa Hafedh Sagban, Sulagna Dutta, Pallav Sengupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/hmbci-2024-0035
